metadata.description: Gemini CLI plugin for Claude Code — delegate tasks, run reviews, and get adversarial design feedback.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Use Gemini CLI from Claude Code to delegate tasks, run code reviews, and get adversarial design feedback. Includes streaming runtime, dual rescue commands, JSON envelope parsing, prompt-size guard, heartbeat-aware status, and a unit + live e2e test harness.
